text:
Sandy sat on her porch swing, sipping from her favorite tea. The autumn breeze tousled her ruffled blond waves, and the golden hues of dusk painted the sky with constellations.

Out of the corner of her eye, she spotted a tiny figure skidding across the manicured grass towards the wrought-iron gate. Her curiosity piqued, Sandy leaned forward and watched as the little creature pranced and danced, clearly in need of help.

Her heart ached as she recognized the creature as Skye, her loyal, furry rodent companion. For years, Skye had been her constant companion, exploring the backyard, bounding after insects, and curling up at her feet while chasing little mice. 

Swiftly, Sandy retrieved a small, sturdy box from her gardening bag and tiptoed towards Skye. Carefully, she placed the box under Skye's feet. The rodent paused, sniffing the box curiously, before hopping clumsily into it and
